subject: ELA
description: Demonstrate understanding of the organization and basic features of print, including following words from left to right, top to bottom, and page by page.

subject: ELA
description: Demonstrate understanding of spoken words, syllables, and sounds (phonemes), including recognizing and producing rhyming words.

subject: ELA
description: Know and apply grade-level phonics and word analysis skills in decoding words, including common high-frequency words by sight.

subject: ELA
description: With prompting and support, ask and answer questions about key details in a text.

subject: ELA
description: With prompting and support, retell familiar stories, including key details.

subject: ELA
description: Use a combination of drawing, dictating, and writing to compose opinion pieces in which they tell a reader the topic or the name of the book they are writing about and state an opinion or preference about the topic or book.

subject: ELA
description: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage when writing or speaking, including printing many upper- and lowercase letters.

subject: ELA
description: Demonstrate understanding of the organization and basic features of print, including recognizing the distinguishing features of a sentence.

subject: ELA
description: Demonstrate understanding of spoken words, syllables, and sounds (phonemes), including distinguishing long from short vowel sounds in spoken single-syllable words.

subject: ELA
description: Know and apply grade-level phonics and word analysis skills in decoding words, including knowing the spelling-sound correspondences for common consonant digraphs.

subject: ELA
description: Ask and answer questions about key details in a text.

subject: ELA
description: Ask and answer questions about key details in a text.

subject: ELA
description: Write opinion pieces in which they introduce the topic or name the book they are writing about, state an opinion, supply a reason for the opinion, and provide some sense of closure.

subject: ELA
description: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage when writing or speaking, including printing all upper- and lowercase letters.

subject: ELA
description: Know and apply grade-level phonics and word analysis skills in decoding words, including distinguishing long and short vowels when reading regularly spelled one-syllable words.

subject: ELA
description: Read with sufficient accuracy and fluency to support comprehension, including reading on-level text orally with accuracy, appropriate rate, and expression.

subject: ELA
description: Ask and answer such questions as who, what, where, when, why, and how to demonstrate understanding of key details in a text.

subject: ELA
description: Ask and answer such questions as who, what, where, when, why, and how to demonstrate understanding of key details in a text.

subject: ELA
description: Write opinion pieces in which they introduce the topic or book they are writing about, state an opinion, supply reasons that support the opinion, use linking words, and provide a concluding statement.

subject: ELA
description: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage when writing or speaking, including using collective nouns and frequently occurring irregular plural nouns.

subject: ELA
description: Ask and answer questions to demonstrate understanding of a text, referring explicitly to the text as the basis for the answers.

subject: ELA
description: Recount stories, including fables, folktales, and myths from diverse cultures; determine the central message, lesson, or moral and explain how it is conveyed through key details in the text.

subject: ELA
description: Ask and answer questions to demonstrate understanding of a text, referring explicitly to the text as the basis for the answers.

subject: ELA
description: Determine the main idea of a text; recount the key details and explain how they support the main idea.

subject: ELA
description: Write opinion pieces on topics or texts, supporting a point of view with reasons, introducing the topic, stating an opinion, and providing a concluding statement.

subject: ELA
description: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage when writing or speaking, explaining the function of nouns, pronouns, verbs, adjectives, and adverbs.

subject: ELA
description: Refer to details and examples in a text when explaining what the text says explicitly and when drawing inferences from the text.

subject: ELA
description: Determine a theme of a story, drama, or poem from details in the text; summarize the text.

subject: ELA
description: Refer to details and examples in a text when explaining what the text says explicitly and when drawing inferences from the text.

subject: ELA
description: Determine the meaning of general academic and domain-specific words or phrases in a text relevant to a grade 4 topic or subject area.

subject: ELA
description: Write opinion pieces on topics or texts, supporting a point of view with reasons and information, including introducing a topic, stating an opinion, and providing a concluding statement.

subject: ELA
description: Write narratives to develop real or imagined experiences or events using effective technique, descriptive details, and clear event sequences.

subject: ELA
description: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage when writing or speaking, including using relative pronouns and relative adverbs.

subject: ELA
description: Determine or clarify the meaning of unknown and multiple-meaning words and phrases based on grade 4 reading and content, choosing flexibly from a range of strategies.

subject: ELA
description: Quote accurately from a text when explaining what the text says explicitly and when drawing inferences from the text.

subject: ELA
description: Determine a theme of a story, drama, or poem from details in the text, including how characters in a story or drama respond to challenges; summarize the text.

subject: ELA
description: Quote accurately from a text when explaining what the text says explicitly and when drawing inferences from the text.

subject: ELA
description: Determine two or more main ideas of a text and explain how they are supported by key details; summarize the text.

subject: ELA
description: Write opinion pieces on topics or texts, supporting a point of view with reasons and information, including logically grouping related ideas and providing a concluding statement.

subject: ELA
description: Write narratives to develop real or imagined experiences or events using effective technique, descriptive details, and clear event sequences.

subject: ELA
description: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage when writing or speaking, including explaining the function of conjunctions, prepositions, and interjections.

subject: ELA
description: Determine or clarify the meaning of unknown and multiple-meaning words and phrases based on grade 5 reading and content, choosing flexibly from a range of strategies.
